groups.note: template §Domain Language: 'the server returns 200' → 'the request should succeed'
template §Domain Language: 'INSERT INTO processing_queue' → domain outcome
steps must not name files or paths (test IDs / implementation files rule)
template §Domain Language: 'response body contains {"error": ...}' → 'the error should indicate ...'
template §Domain Language anti-pattern table names JWT/Redis/S3-style internals; endpoints and tokens are implementation, not domain
